note_text: Wound note - Leftplantar. Meas 1.9x3.2x1.2cm. Mod serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 49% gran, 51% slough. Periwound erythematous. Collagen dsg changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Thornton notified.
